title: Fluffy British Beef Roast
description: A familyfriendly roast with a velvety gravy and fluffy interior, perfect for kids and sugarfree.
instructions: Preheat oven to 220 °C (425 °F). Rub the roast with salt, pepper and thyme.
Heat olive oil in an oven‑proof skillet over medium‑high heat. Sear the roast 3‑4 min on each side until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and roast for 15 min.
Reduce the oven temperature to 180 °C (350 °F). Add onions, carrots, garlic and the bay leaf to the skillet, cover and roast for 1 h 15 min or until the meat is tender.
Remove the roast, tent with foil and let it rest 15 min before slicing.
Meanwhile, pour the pan juices into a saucepan. Stir in the flour and cook for 2 min to make a roux.
Gradually add the beef stock and red wine, stirring constantly. Bring to a simmer and add the tomato paste. Cook 10 min until the gravy thickens.
Finish the gravy with butter, season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the sliced roast with the warm gravy and roasted vegetables.
Enjoy a delicious, fluffy British beef roast that’s kid‑friendly and sugar‑free.
